stemHtml: In the North Atlantic, you can often see a series of depressions located in a row and travelling from west to east. These depressions:

options.a: are normally generated at the polar front.
options.b: are mostly generated by convergence between the subtropical highs and the equatorial trough.
options.c: are residuals of tropical cyclones in the Florida area.
options.d: are primarily generated by the vaporization process that takes place above the ocean.
